channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Severely ill prisoners granted early release remain stuck behind bars
item.description: Compassionate release is granted to some prisoners, but a lack of long-term care facilities leaves many unable to leave.

item.title: Two U.S. service members killed, one missing after Iranian strike in Jordan
item.description: U.S. forces launched airstrikes against Iran after two service members were killed and one went missing.

item.title: Vice President JD Vance and wife Usha welcome fourth child
item.description: This marks the first time in over 150 years that a vice president's family has had a child while in office.

item.title: Student loan defaults surge after COVID payment pause ends
item.description: Defaults on student loans have surged to record levels as borrowers struggle to keep up with payments.
